gm_commands.name: .additem
gm_commands.description: Adds the specified amount of the item to your inventory.

gm_commands.name: .tele
gm_commands.description: Teleports you to the specified location (e.g. .tele stormwind).

gm_commands.name: .npc add
gm_commands.description: Spawns a creature at your exact location permanently.

gm_commands.name: .learn
gm_commands.description: Teaches your character the specified spell.

gm_commands.name: .levelup
gm_commands.description: Increases your character's level by the specified amount.

gm_commands.name: .server info
gm_commands.description: Displays the connected players and server uptime.

gm_commands.name: .go creature
gm_commands.description: Teleports your character to the specified creature.

gm_commands.name: .go object
gm_commands.description: Teleports your character to the specified gameobject.

gm_commands.name: .lookup item
gm_commands.description: Searches for an item by name and returns its ID.
